## 🎯 WCAG Criteria

**Which WCAG 2.1 success criteria does this violate?**
- [ ] 1.1.1 Non-text Content (A)
- [ ] 1.3.1 Info and Relationships (A)
- [ ] 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum) (AA)
- [ ] 2.1.1 Keyboard (A)
- [ ] 2.4.3 Focus Order (A)
- [ ] 2.4.7 Focus Visible (AA)
- [ ] 3.2.2 On Input (A)
- [ ] 3.3.1 Error Identification (A)
- [ ] 3.3.2 Labels or Instructions (A)
- [ ] 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (A)
- [ ] Other: _______________

**Reference:** https://www.w3.org/WAI/WCAG21/quickref/

## 🔴 Severity

**How would you rate the severity of this issue?**
- [ ] **Critical** - Completely blocks access to core functionality
- [ ] **Serious** - Significantly hinders ability to complete tasks
- [ ] **Moderate** - Makes tasks difficult but not impossible
- [ ] **Minor** - Causes minor inconvenience

## 👥 User Impact

**Who is affected by this issue?**
- [ ] Screen reader users (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver)
- [ ] Keyboard-only users
- [ ] Users with low vision
- [ ] Users with color blindness
- [ ] Users with motor disabilities
- [ ] Users with cognitive disabilities
- [ ] All users

**Estimated impact:**
- [ ] Affects all users of the component
- [ ] Affects users in specific scenarios: _______________
- [ ] Edge case, rarely encountered

## ✅ Definition of Done

**This issue is resolved when:**
- [ ] The reported barrier is removed
- [ ] Component passes ESLint jsx-a11y rules
- [ ] Component passes axe DevTools scan
- [ ] Manual keyboard testing succeeds
- [ ] Screen reader testing succeeds (if applicable)
- [ ] Fix is tested with the affected user group
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Unit/integration tests added (if applicable)
